options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: tag_link
options.description: When you transform the ball, everyone who enabled tag link changes character or the ball. Of course, the reverse is true too. Default off.

options.name: trap_link
options.description: When you get a trap, sends a similar trap to everyone else with trap link enabled. Of course, the reverse is true too. Default off.

options.name: tip_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of traps that are Tips.
!! UNIMPLIMENTED !!

options.name: generate_puml
options.description:
Generates a .puml file of the world for debugging use with the AP Logic Builder. Default off.
!! DEBUG !!

options.name: victory_condition
options.description:
The condition needed to beat Glover.
Endscreen: Get to the endscreen.
Crystal Count: Get the number of crystals required to the castle cave.
Golden Garibs: Get the number of Golden Garib items required

options.name: required_crystals
options.description: The number of crystals needed to beat Glover while Victory Condition is Crystal Count. Default 4.

options.name: golden_garib_count
options.description: The number of Golden Garibs in the world pool while Victory Condition is Golden Garibs. Default 12.

options.name: required_golden_garibs
options.description: The number of Golden Garibs required to win while Victory Condition is Golden Garibs. Default 6.

options.name: difficulty_logic
options.description:
What tricks are allowed. Default Intended.
Intended: No clips, no skips, no glitches. Things that are reasonable for a player to do.
Easy Tricks: Jumping through the garib completion marks is expected. Things that are hard to do that don't require glitches, and minor skips are allowed.
Hard Tricks: Any glitches and clips are expected.

options.name: easy_ball_walk
options.description: Forces the game to de-invert ball controls.

options.name: starting_ball
options.description:
Set the ball you start with. Default Crystal.
Any Random and Power Ball require Power Ball Transformation to be enabled.

options.name: randomize_jump
options.description: Start without jump. Default off.

options.name: include_power_ball
options.description: Adds the Power Ball to the items. Default off.

options.name: garib_logic
options.description:
How the garibs are placed in logic. Default Garib Groups.
Level Garibs: Acts as vanilla Glover.
Garib Groups: Each group of garibs in a level is a check. You are sent bundles of garibs.
Garibsanity: Each garib is a check. You can be sent individual garibs.

options.name: garib_sorting
options.description:
Where Garibs are sent to. Default In Order. Ignored if Garib Logic is Level Garibs.
By Level: Garibs sent to you are from specific levels, and all garibs from that level must be gotten to get a completion mark.
In Order: Garibs are sent to levels in world order.
Random Order: Garibs are sent to levels in a random order.

options.name: garib_order_overrides
options.description:
The postions of checkpoints when Garib Sorting is set to Random Order.
Structured World Name[Level Number] : Array Positon
Example "Atl3" : 0 (Starts the game's garib order with Atl3)

options.name: mad_garibs
options.description: Swaps garibs with the Mad Garib variant.

options.name: random_garib_sounds
options.description:
Makes garib sounds use random sounds instead.
Only works if garibs are not Level Garibs.

options.name: disable_garib_items
options.description:
Replaces filler garib items with other items from the filler table.
Only works if garibs are enabled and aren't required to unlock checks.

options.name: entrance_randomizer
options.description: Loading zones are randomized. Default on.

options.name: entrance_overrides
open_worlds
options.description: All the world portals start open. Default off.

options.name: open_levels
options.description: All doors in each wayroom start open. Default off.

options.name: portalsanity
options.description: Goals and All Garibs in Level are checks. Portals and garib completion marks are items. Default off.

options.name: bonus_levels
options.description: Makes Bonus Levels contain checks. Default on.

options.name: spawning_checkpoint_randomizer
options.description: Spawning checkpoints are randomized. Default off.

options.name: checkpoint_overrides
options.description:
The postions of checkpoints when Spawn Randomizer is on.
Structured World Name[Level Number] : [Checkpoint Number]
Example "Atl3" : 2 (Spawns you at the top of the stairs in Atlantis 3)

options.name: checkpoint_checks
options.description: Checkpoints are checks and items. Default off.

options.name: switches_checks
options.description: Switches are checks and level events are items. Default on.

options.name: mr_tip_checks
options.description: Mr. Tips are checks. Default on.

options.name: enemysanity
options.description: Enemies that can normally be defeated are checks.

options.name: insectity
options.description: Defeating insects are checks.

options.name: total_scores
options.description:
What total scores being reached will give checks.
Formatted ["Score Value A", "Score Value B"]
Example ["50000", "100000"]
Scores must be a multiple of 10000.

options.name: level_scores
mr_hints
options.description:
Mr. Tips give AP hints. Default 1.
Catagory only will tell you a vauge hint in regards to the quality, but not the item.

options.name: chicken_hints
options.description: Cheat Chicken gives AP hints. Default 3.

options.name: mr_tip_text_display
options.description:
Sets the text of Mr. Tip Textboxes. Default Hints and Custom.
Off: Ingame Mr. Tips do not display text.
Hints and Custom: Displays hint text until there are no more hints, and then falls back to custom.
Custom Only: Only displays custom text. Multiworld hints can still be given.

options.name: mr_hints_scouts
options.description: Makes Mr. Tip's hints show up as multiworld hints.

options.name: filler_duration
options.description:
On a scale from 1-5, how full the potion bottle gets when you are given a filler effect.
This also changes the duration of traps.

options.name: extra_garibs_value
options.description: How many Garibs 'Extra Garibs' are worth. Only applies if Garib Sorting is not By Level.

options.name: trap_percentage
options.description: What percentage of checks that would be filler are replaced with traps. Default is 20.

options.name: filler_extra_garibs_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Extra Garibs. Default is 0.

options.name: filler_chicken_sound_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that play a chicken noise. That's it. Default is 10.

options.name: filler_life_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Extra Lives. Default is 50.

options.name: filler_boomerang_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Boomerang Balls. Default is 5.

options.name: filler_beachball_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Beach Balls. Default is 5.

options.name: filler_hercules_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Hercules Potions. Default is 5.

options.name: filler_helicopter_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Helicopter Potions. Default is 5.

options.name: filler_speed_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Speed Potions. Default is 5.

options.name: filler_frog_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Frog Potions. Default is 5.

options.name: filler_death_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Death Potions. Default is 5.

options.name: filler_sticky_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Sticky Potions. Default is 5.

options.name: filler_big_ball_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Big Balls. Default is 5.

options.name: filler_low_gravity_weight
options.description: The weight of filler items that are Low Gravity. Default is 5.

options.name: frog_trap_weight
options.description: The weight of traps that are Frog Traps. Default is 20.

options.name: cursed_ball_trap_weight
options.description: The weight of traps that are Cursed Ball. Default is 20.

options.name: instant_crystal_trap_weight
options.description: The weight of traps that are Crystal Transformations. Default is 15.

options.name: camera_rotate_trap_weight
options.description: The weight of traps that are Camera Tilts. Default is 15.

options.name: fish_eye_trap_weight
options.description: The weight of traps that are Fish Eyes. Default is 15.

options.name: enemy_ball_trap_weight
options.description: The weight of traps that make your ball an enemy. Default is 10.

options.name: control_ball_trap_weight
options.description: The weight of traps that turn you into the ball. Default is 10.

options.name: invisiball_trap_weight
options.description: The weight of traps that make your ball vanish. Default is 5.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
